patch.value: pm list should default to --brief (full output via --full) to halve token cost

Dogfood 2026-05-17: `pm list` default returns 143 lines for 11 items (~12 lines per row). `--brief` returns 59 lines (~5 per row). Agents pay 2x context for the default, almost never needing the verbose fields.

Proposal: flip default to brief; add --full for current behavior. Keep --compact, --fields, --json untouched. Update list contract test and MCP pm_list description.

Acceptance: pm list returns brief shape by default; pm list --full matches existing default output; --json default ≤ half its current byte cost on the dogfood tracker.
